noCompanies.title: Tạo công ty đầu tiên của bạn
noCompanies.description: Bắt đầu bằng cách tạo một công ty.

cliFallback.title: Prefer to finish setup from the host?
cliFallback.inviteActive: A bootstrap invite is already active. Check your Paperclip startup logs for the first-admin URL, or run this command on the host to rotate it:
cliFallback.command: Run this command on the host that runs Paperclip to print a one-time first-admin invite URL:

error.claimedTitle: Someone else has already claimed this instance.
error.claimedBody: Refresh to sign in, or ask the existing admin to invite you from Instance settings -> Access.
error.sessionExpiredTitle: Your session expired. Sign in again to claim this instance.
error.networkTitle: We couldn't reach the server. Try again in a moment.

waiting.title: This Paperclip is waiting on its first admin
waiting.body: This instance runs in invite-only mode. The operator must generate a one-time first-admin invite URL from the host. Once you have the link, open it from this browser to finish setup.
waiting.publicNote: Browser-based claim is intentionally disabled in public mode so anyone on the network can't promote themselves.

success.title: You're the instance admin
success.body: Setup is complete. Taking you to onboarding to create your first company...

setup.title: Finish setting up this Paperclip
setup.signedOutBody: No admin has claimed this instance yet. Sign in or create your Paperclip account to become the first admin from this browser.
setup.signedInBody: No admin has claimed this instance yet. Claim it now to become the first admin and start onboarding.

signIn.title: Sign in to Paperclip
signIn.subtitle: Use your email and password to access this instance.

signUp.title: Create your Paperclip account
signUp.subtitle: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.

error.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.

empty.noMatchSuffix: to search all or keep typing to refine.

viewProfile.label: View profile
viewProfile.description: Open your activity, task, and usage ledger.

editProfile.label: Edit profile
editProfile.description: Update your display name and avatar.

documentation.label: Documentation
documentation.description: Open Paperclip docs in a new tab.

feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.description: Share feedback or report an issue.

welcome.message: Welcome to Paperclip. Set up your first company and agent to get started.

dashboard.noCompany: Create or select a company to view the dashboard.

selectCompany.projects: Select a company to view projects.

agents.emptyCreate: Create your first agent to get started.
